content: Tailwind v4 + Vite: install 'tailwindcss @tailwindcss/vite'. In vite.config.ts add plugin: tailwindcss(). CSS entry file: '@import tailwindcss'; followed by '@theme { --color-bg: #0a0e14; ... }' block — NO tailwind.config.js. The @theme block auto-generates :root CSS vars AND utility classes. Custom colors use --color-<name> prefix. Fonts use --font-<name>. Everything in @theme is a design token exposed as a CSS variable. No postcss or autoprefixer config needed (built into v4). Current version: tailwindcss@4.3.1, @tailwindcss/vite@4.3.1.
